results.title: Club Kid
results.overview: A hard-partying New York City club promoter sees his whirlwind lifestyle upended by the arrival of the 10-year-old son he never knew he had.

results.title: Club Kid Alley
results.overview: What does a night of debauchery look like for the esteemed Drag, Burlesque, and Club Kids of Toronto? Let Bom Bae guide you through as the queers get ready for a night of debauchary at the club kid manor (Spadina Museum).

results.title: The Jesus Kids' Club
results.overview: Join Chris, Diana, and Alex as they try to make a difference in the lives of the people around them. From bullies and grumpy neighbors to puppies at the animal shelter, the Jesus Kids Club is there to help, sharing God s love and keeping Jesus at the center of their lives. Episode 1: The Best Reward Chris learns that helping others can be the best reward of all! Episode 2: Zombie Cat Alex learns that God s plan for him isn't always what he expects. Episode 3: Prayer for One God uses Diana as a blessing for one special person. Episode 4: Bad Gum Chris, Diana, and Alex show the neighborhood bully who Jesus is. Episode 5: Remy s Carnival Alex gives something special to brighten the day of a little boy. Episode 6: Checkmate Chris's persistence pays off while trying to help Mr. Buckle.

results.title: Raggs Kids Club Band: Pawsuuup! Tour
results.original_title: Raggs Kids Club Band: Pawsuuup! Tour
results.overview: Join musical canine Raggs and the rest of his all-dog band as they hit the road on their Pawsuuup! Tour, with this collection of live concert footage and plenty of backstage fun featuring the stars of the popular children's series. Raggs, Trilby, Pido, B. Max and Razzles will have kids dancing, singing and laughing with their offstage antics and musical compositions that deliver rock, hip-hop, funk and more, with lyrics written for young ears.

results.title: Club avant Seine : Kids Return - Rock en Seine 2022
results.original_title: Club avant Seine : Kids Return - Rock en Seine 2022

results.title: Holly Hippo's Book Club for Kids: Sleeping Beauty
results.original_title: Holly Hippo's Book Club for Kids: Sleeping Beauty
results.overview: Join a pair of sassy animal friends as they give their takes and share facts on the Brothers Grimm's classic tale of a princess locked in a trance.

results.title: Gina D's Kids Club: Join in on the Fun
results.original_title: Gina D's Kids Club: Join in on the Fun
results.overview: Host Gina D and her puppet pals invite preschoolers to join the fun-filled Kids Club in this collection of the series that aims to entertain little ones while teaching positive values. "Gina D's Kids Club" incorporates a spirited mix of live-action characters, puppets, animation and songs. The episodes "Smile-Ability," "Good News" and "Join the Club" are included, plus the award-winning safety segment "Mr. Bicycle Man."

results.title: The Bike Squad
results.overview: A bunch of kids on bikes try to save a pooch from some nasty dog snatchers.

results.title: Clubbed
results.overview: An underworld drama set in the early 1980s, about a lonely factory worker whose life is transformed when he becomes a nightclub doorman.

results.title: Lovers Club Asami Kubota
results.original_title: 久保田あさみ 愛人倶楽部

results.title: Clubhouse Detectives
results.overview: Late one night, Billy and Kade Ruckman see their neighbor, Michael Chambers, murder a woman, but Chambers has a story all set to convince their mother Vicky, that it was just a rehearsal scene from an opera. The only ones who can help them find the body in Chambers' house before he moves and gets rid of all evidence, are their friends, Jimmy, Eddie, and J.J., who are determined to find the body before Chambers finds them.
